recent_excerpts: Black Hills InfoSec published a practical guide to malware analysis covering static, dynamic, and memory analysis techniques for defenders seeking to reverse-engineer samples.
Black Hills InfoSec details how to transform stale cybersecurity tabletop exercises into immersive scenario simulations that test real incident response decisions.
BHIS released a cloud security guide covering IAM misconfigurations, shared responsibility gaps, and logging blind spots — essential reading for teams securing AWS, Azure, or GCP…
